information.name: hermes
information.description: Two-way SMS inbox and automated notifications via Twilio, directly from UISP.
information.author: Your Name

configuration.label: Public URL
configuration.description: Your UISP public-facing domain, e.g. https://uisp.yourdomain.com — used to validate incoming Twilio webhook signatures. Leave blank on local/test installs (signature validation is automatically skipped for private/local IP addresses).

configuration.label: Twilio Account SID
configuration.description: Found on your Twilio Console dashboard.

configuration.label: Twilio Auth Token
configuration.description: Found on your Twilio Console dashboard. Keep this secret.

configuration.label: Twilio From Number
configuration.description: Your Twilio phone number in E.164 format, e.g. +15551234567

configuration.label: invoice.add — New Invoice
configuration.description: SMS sent when a new invoice is created. Use %%invoice.number%%, %%invoice.total%%, %%invoice.currencyCode%%, %%invoice.dueDate%%, %%client.firstName%%, %%client.lastName%%. Leave blank to disable.

configuration.label: invoice.overdue — Overdue Invoice
configuration.description: SMS sent when an invoice becomes overdue. Same placeholders as above. Leave blank to disable.

configuration.label: invoice.near_due — Invoice Near Due
configuration.description: SMS sent when an invoice is nearing its due date. Leave blank to disable.

configuration.label: payment.add — Payment Received
configuration.description: NOTE: %%client.firstName%%, %%client.lastName%% are not passed using this. SMS sent when a payment is received. Use %%payment.amount%%, %%payment.currencyCode%%, . Leave blank to disable.

configuration.label: service.suspend — Service Suspended
configuration.description: SMS sent when a client service is suspended. Use %%service.name%%, %%client.firstName%%, %%client.lastName%%. Leave blank to disable.

configuration.label: service.activate — Service Activated
configuration.description: SMS sent when a suspended service is reactivated. Leave blank to disable.

configuration.label: Send $0 Invoice Notifications
configuration.description: Check this to send SMS notifications for $0 invoices.
